inputs.label: Resting Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Your resting heart rate in beats per minute. Measure after waking up, before getting out of bed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Your resting heart rate in beats per minute. Measure after waking up, before getting out of bed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dinlenme kalp atış hızınız (dakikadaki atım sayısı). Uyandıktan sonra, yataktan kalkmadan önce ölçün.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ihr Ruhepuls in Schlägen pro Minute. Messen Sie nach dem Aufwachen, bevor Sie aufstehen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Votre fréquence cardiaque au repos en battements par minute. Mesurez après le réveil, avant de vous lever.
businessContext_i18n.es: Su frecuencia cardíaca en reposo en latidos por minuto. Mida después de despertarse, antes de levantarse de la cama.

inputs.label: Maximum Heart Rate (optional)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum heart rate in bpm. Enter 0 to estimate using formula (208 - 0.7 * age).

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum heart rate in bpm. Enter 0 to estimate using formula (208 - 0.7 * age).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maksimum kalp atış hızı (bpm). Tahmin için 0 girin (formül: 208 - 0.7 * yaş).
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Herzfrequenz in bpm. Geben Sie 0 ein, um mit der Formel (208 - 0,7 * Alter) zu schätzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence cardiaque maximale en bpm. Entrez 0 pour estimer avec la formule (208 - 0,7 * âge).
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia cardíaca máxima en lpm. Ingrese 0 para estimar usando la fórmula (208 - 0.7 * edad).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
